CustomField.description: IF( AND(Site_Visit__c > 0, No_of_Booking__c > 0), "P1", IF( Site_Visit__c > 0, "P2", IF( No_Of_Enquries__c > 0, "P3", IF( CP_Visited_Project__c, "P4", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Met_Location__c)), "P5", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(CP_Calling__c)), "P6", "P7" ))))))
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(Site_Visit__c > 0, No_of_Booking__c > 0), "P1", IF( Site_Visit__c > 0, "P2", IF( No_of_Leads__c > 0, "P3", IF( CP_Visited_Project__c, "P4", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Met_Location__c)), "P5", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(CP_Calling__c)), "P6", "P7" ))))))
CustomField.label: Category
